summary: Phase 2 API Testing COMPLETE. All 21 backend API tests PASSED (100%). Frontend regression tests PASSED - dashboard, kanban, portfolio views all working. NEW APIS VERIFIED: Workflow Templates full CRUD (6 endpoints), Deliverables full CRUD (7 endpoints), Lead field updates (projectType, industry, deliverableType).
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Login with test credentials returns 200 with token
GET /api/leads - Returns leads with new fields (projectType, industry, deliverableType)
GET /api/leads?projectType=SERVICE - Filter by projectType works
GET /api/leads/:id - Returns single lead with new fields
PATCH /api/leads/:id - Can update projectType=COMMISSION, industry=PHOTOGRAPHY, deliverableType=PRINTS
POST /api/workflow-templates - Create template with 5 stages (PHOTOGRAPHY workflow)
GET /api/workflow-templates - List all templates
GET /api/workflow-templates/:id - Get single template with stages
GET /api/workflow-templates/industry/:industry - Filter by industry=PHOTOGRAPHY
PATCH /api/workflow-templates/:id - Update template name/description
DELETE /api/workflow-templates/:id - Delete template (cascade deletes stages)
POST /api/leads/:leadId/deliverables - Create deliverable for a lead
GET /api/leads/:leadId/deliverables - List deliverables for a lead
GET /api/deliverables/:id - Get single deliverable with lead info
PATCH /api/deliverables/:id - Update deliverable fields
PATCH /api/deliverables/:id/status PENDING → IN_PROGRESS - Status transition works
PATCH /api/deliverables/:id/status IN_PROGRESS → DELIVERED - Auto-sets completedAt
DELETE /api/deliverables/:id - Delete deliverable
GET /api/leads/stats - Dashboard stats still work (18 total leads)
GET /api/portfolio - Portfolio still works (1 item)
GET /api/analytics/dashboard - Analytics still works
Frontend: Login flow works - dashboard loads after successful login
Frontend: Dashboard stats cards show (18 Total, 7 New, 4 Quoted, 5 Booked)
Frontend: Kanban view shows columns (New:7, Contacted:2, Quoted:4, Negotiating:0)
Frontend: Portfolio view loads with 'My Portfolio' header
Frontend: Analytics view accessible
Frontend: Calendar view accessible
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 2 API endpoints properly implemented and secured with JWT auth
Workflow Templates: Full CRUD working with stages cascade delete on template deletion
Deliverables: All routes correctly mounted - /api/leads/:leadId/deliverables and /api/deliverables/:id
Lead PATCH now correctly accepts and persists projectType, industry, deliverableType
Valid enum validation working for all new fields (ProjectType, IndustryType, DeliverableType, StageType, DeliverableStatus)
Status transition auto-timestamps: DELIVERED/SHIPPED sets completedAt, SHIPPED sets shippedAt
Backward compatibility maintained - existing leads work with new defaults
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up: TEST_Wedding Photography Workflow template (deleted), TEST_Wedding Album deliverable (deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 APIs fully tested: Workflow Templates CRUD (6 endpoints at /api/workflow-templates), Deliverables CRUD (7 endpoints at /api/leads/:leadId/deliverables and /api/deliverables/:id), Lead field updates (projectType, industry, deliverableType via PATCH). All enums validated: ProjectType (SERVICE, COMMISSION, PROJECT, PRODUCT_SALE), IndustryType (PHOTOGRAPHY, VIDEOGRAPHY, etc.), DeliverableType (DIGITAL_FILES, PHYSICAL_ART, PRINTS, SERVICE, WEBSITE, MIXED), DeliverableStatus (PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, READY, DELIVERED, SHIPPED). Backend: Express/TypeScript on port 8001, Frontend: Vite React/TS on port 3000. Project root: /app/kolor-studio-v2/

workflow_templates.GET /api/workflow-templates: List user templates + system defaults - PASS
workflow_templates.GET /api/workflow-templates/:id: Get single template with stages - PASS

deliverables.GET /api/deliverables/:id: Get single deliverable with lead info - PASS

lead_updates.GET /api/leads: Returns new fields (projectType, industry, deliverableType) - PASS
